protocol_notes: Started Sept 25, 2025. Only just starting to appreciate impact. Plans to run continuously. Has about 5 vials left and ordered another kit. Takes zinc in AM as supplement and uses GHK-Cu at night. Some nights forgets dose. Notes copper inclusion is relatively nominal - 0.157 mg/1 mg GHK-Cu in standard 1:1 ratio. Prefers single peptides to control own dosages.
